## What does this PR do?
<!-- The change, in plain language. What question does it move forward? -->


## How did you check it's correct?
<!-- Verification against reality: a known case, a sanity plot, counts, the docs.
     "It runs without errors" is not verification. -->


## How did the AI assistant help, and what did you do to own it?
<!-- Lightweight + honest (see handbook/04-documenting-ai-use.md). E.g.:
     "Assistant drafted the compositing function; I chose the date window and
      verified output against 2022 plot means."
     If you leaned on it heavily somewhere you're still learning, say so — that's
     a useful flag, not a confession. Disclosure is never penalized; hiding it is. -->


## Can you explain every line here with the AI closed?
<!-- [ ] Yes  /  [ ] Mostly, except: ___  (flag what to review together) -->
